text:
Created attachment 205936
Screenshot

grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % sudo unetbootin

When the menu button is clicked, there's no menu. 

----

If (instead) I specify the targetdrive at the command line, then the menu is pre-populated but then clicking OK results in a crash – bug 236972, I guess.
